full_text:
Cen Zhi (Gongxiao) 岑桎 (公孝)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cen Zhi (岑桎), styledGongxiao (公孝), was born in Nanyang. One of the Eight Paragons of Jiangxia. From Nanyang. Cen Zhi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
